function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_29__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2025-12-29 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH). Please see the attachment.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound write completed; checklist: attachment path was read earlier, single attachment so ordering valid newest-first, recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email from nina.md, no quoted source text required, subject with colon-space is correctly double-quoted. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item (already read).
next_step.observation: Outbound email record was written successfully with one invoice attachment and canonical recipient.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task was to handle next inbox item. I processed lowest inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md, verified sender against canonical entity (nina.md), verified requested invoice by exact date/vendor in finance record, created outbound email draft in outbox with correct recipient and attachment, then deleted inbox item. Completeness: only 1 open inbox item in preflight and handled fully. No arithmetic required.
next_step.observation: Processed inbox item was deleted after successful outbound draft creation.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by preparing an outbound invoice resend draft to Nina with the requested 2025-12-29 Nordstern invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS before working in each folder, used inbox-email header as canonical sender metadata, verified recipient via entity primary_contact_email, and deleted inbox item only after completing the requested action.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request asked to resend the 2025-12-29 Nordstern invoice. Sender authenticity was confirmed by matching inbox `from` to `10_entities/cast/nina.md` primary_contact_email. The exact invoice was confirmed in `50_finance/invoices/2025_12_29__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md` (issued_on 2025-12-29, counterparty Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH). An outbound email record was then created in the outbox with that invoice attached, and the processed inbox file was deleted per inbox workflow.
